block_05: ETF — the Most Diversified Trading Instrument
block_06: Among other instruments like Forex and Crypto, there is one that is usually preferred by more experienced investors. This instrument is called an ETF — exchange-traded fund. Read this guide and learn how to trade S&P 500 ETF and other ETFs on IQOption.
block_08: Enhanced 2 Moving Averages Strategy for Better Results
block_09: A moving average is an indicator that considers past price points to overlay an average price on the chart. The article overviews different types of moving averages to help you get a better feeling of the prevailing trend, as well as time an entry in a trade.
